mapper.sql:
p.id, p.property_type, p.name, p.sgg_cd, ( SELECT r.sgg_nm FROM region r WHERE r.sgg_cd = p.sgg_cd LIMIT 1 ) AS sgg_nm, p.umd_nm, p.jibun, p.build_year, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.latest_sale_price, p.latest_deposit, p.latest_monthly_rent,
( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.deposit > 0 AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, ( SELECT rd.monthly_rent FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.deposit > 0 AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent_amount, ( SELECT d.price FROM ( SELECT sd.deal_amount AS price, sd.deal_date, sd.id FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id UNION ALL SELECT rd.deposit AS price, rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id ) d ORDER BY d.deal_date DESC, d.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_price, ( SELECT d.deal_date FROM ( SELECT sd.deal_date, sd.id FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id UNION ALL SELECT rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id ) d ORDER BY d.deal_date DESC, d.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_date, ( SELECT d.exclusive_area FROM ( SELECT sd.exclusive_area, sd.deal_date, sd.id FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id UNION ALL SELECT rd.exclusive_area, rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id ) d ORDER BY d.deal_date DESC, d.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS exclusive_area
